title: SAVE THE DATE: 10th Annual Indigenous World Film Festival
summary: 10th Annual Indigenous World Film Festival January 17 & 18, 2014 Alaska Native Heritage Center 8800 Heritage Center Drive, Anchorage, Alaska To learn more visit www.alaskanative.net . The post SAVE THE DATE: 10th Annual Indigenous World Film Festival first appeared on CIRI .

title: 2014 Alaska Native Art Auction donations sought to support Native programming
summary: “Walrus Dance” painting donated in 2013 by Yup’ik and Inupiaq artist Percy C. Avugiak. Courtesy of KNBA. title: Improvements in primary care in Wasilla
summary: Courtesy of SCF. Options for primary health care and dentistry for Alaska Native and American Indian people have expanded in the Matanuska-Susitna Valley. Southcentral Foundation now offers six integrated care teams in Wasilla at the Benteh Nuutah Valley Native Primary Care Center (VNPCC). An integr...

title: 2014 dividend payments
summary: CIRI’s dividend policy states that the total CIRI dividend payment to shareholders in any given year is equal to 3.5 percent of total shareholders’ equity, calculated as of Dec. 31 of the prior year. The CIRI Board is expected to set the dates of record for 2014 shareholder distributions in late Feb...

summary: The following CIRI shareholders do not have a current mailing address on record. title: Spotlight: Tiffany Tutiakoff
summary: Photo by Jason Moore. Nine years ago, as an eager intern, CIRI shareholder Tiffany Tutiakoff stepped into the offices of the advertising agency Northwest Strategies. Her previous jobs at the Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) and CIRI had exposed her to the world of marketing and advertising. title: Attention job seekers! 2014 CIRI Job Fair and Resume Development Workshop
summary: Mark your calendars: the second annual CIRI Shareholder Job and Resource Fair will be held Tuesday, Jan. 28 from 9 a.m. to 3 p.m. in the First Floor Conference Room/atrium at the CIRI building, at 2525 C Street in Anchorage. title: A word from the president, December 2013
summary: As we reflect upon 2013 and look forward to 2014, I am reminded of what a great year it has been. For me, personally, I have thoroughly enjoyed my first year as CIRI’s president and chief executive officer. Every day I am inspired and motivated by CIRI’s mission and am grateful for the terrific team of employees I have the privilege of leading. The opportunities that have brought all of us together to celebrate our culture and share new ideas...

summary: The CIRI Nominating Committee seeks CIRI shareholders interested in being considered for nomination to the 2014 CIRI Board of Directors’ candidate slate. title: In memory, December 2013
summary: Courtesy of the Kiyutelluk family. Davis Kiyutelluk, 90 Davis Kiyutelluk passed away July 26 at home in Shishmaref, Alaska. Mr. Kiyutelluk was born June 15, 1923, in Shishmaref.
